ai_role: HBM memory leader for AI accelerators
tvs_tiebreaker: Treat as a cyclical structural bottleneck; valuation and macro timing matter heavily.
technical_timing_rule: Technical and macro timing should gate adds; prefer SETUP or STRONG_SETUP and avoid chasing EXTENDED moves.
rationale: SK Hynix is a key HBM leader with a real AI memory bottleneck, but memory pricing remains cyclical and highly correlated with AI accelerator demand.
